betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Particle Accelerator§f

§aA modular end-game machine that smashes particles at relativistic speeds to create exotic matter!§f

§bThe Particle Accelerator§f is a complex modular machine that accelerates particles to relativistic speeds using superconducting magnets. Unlike the Cyclotron which transmutes elements via bombardment, the Particle Accelerator collides particles together to create entirely new byproducts — antimatter, antischrabidium, higgs bosons, and more.

§6Types§f:
§b• Linear Accelerator§f — straight design using RF cavities and quadrupole magnets
§b• Synchrotron (Circular)§f — square ring design, adds dipole magnets for turns

§6Core Components§f:
§b• Beamline§f — connects all accelerator parts; extends ring size cheaply
§b• Particle Source§f — creates the particle beam from two input items
§b• RF Cavity§f — accelerates particle by 100 points (+100 defocus); particle crashes at 1000 defocus
§b• Quadrupole Magnets§f — reduces defocus by 100 points (requires large coils)
§b• Dipole Magnets§f — redirects particles around corners (requires large coils)
§b• Particle Detector§f — accepts particles with 0 defocus and executes recipes

§6Cooling§f: All components require §bcold perfluoromethyl§f cooling. Hot perfluoromethyl can be redirected to a compressor for re-cooling (feedback loop, some energy loss).

§6Coils§f (required for quadrupoles/dipoles to function):
§b• Large Gold Coil§f — min 0, max 2,200, dipole side min 15
§b• Large NbTi Coil§f — min 1,500, max 8,400, dipole side min 21
§b• Large BSCCO Coil§f — min 7,500, max 15,000, dipole side min 27
§b• Large Chlorophyte Coil§f — min 14,500, max 75,000, dipole side min 51

Overtiered (below min range) coils cause 10x power penalty per coil; undersized dipoles add another 10x. Both stack = 100x power draw, exceeding the magnet's buffer and crashing the particle.

§6Power§f: Requires several MHE to function. Fission or fusion recommended. Calculate power needs before building!

§eTip§f: Build your accelerator large enough for your target coil tier to avoid the 10x/100x power penalties. The ring's side length must exceed the dipole minimum side length for your coil type!
